title: P-Seminar: Live Stream Production
description: During my P-Seminar, I managed the technical setup for live streaming events. This included video editing, managing OBS transitions, providing good camera positioning and ensuring high-quality audio output for our viewers.

title: Professional Portfolio Development
description: Developed and deployed a personal portfolio site using the Hugo framework. Managed the local development environment via PowerShell, configured technical sections for Skills and Education, and successfully migrated the local build to a live GitHub Pages server.

title: Mini RPG - Text-Based Dungeon Game
description: Developed a complete text-based RPG in 68000 Assembly Language with 3 playable classes (Warrior/Mage/Assassin), each featuring unique skill trees and dynamic AI attack patterns. Implemented procedural random number generation via Linear Congruential Generator, a branching narrative system with multiple endings driven by player choices, and a real-time damage calculation engine incorporating stat scaling and debuff mechanics. The game includes an innovative soul anchor mechanic that triggers mid-fight phase transitions, creating strategic depth and challenging gameplay.
